message:
chore(beads): file 2 more review-of-review findings

ft-0etp3 (MEDIUM, review/search): flags 821edfad (semantic-embedder
schema-metadata invalidation) as dead wiring — SEMANTIC_EMBEDDER_VERSION
and SEMANTIC_EMBEDDING_DIMENSION are hardcoded placeholders
("unversioned" / 0) at chunk_vector_store.rs:28-30, so the invalidation
mechanism never fires. Action: plumb real fastembed model identity
(name + dim) into the constants.

ft-7bcox (LOW, review/recording): fresh-eyes review of 7c8deb1d
(FrameWriter Drop flush). Drop does I/O via BufWriter::flush; if that
panics during panic unwinding (OOM, broken-pipe custom impl) Rust aborts
the process. std File doesn't panic on I/O errors so risk is theoretical,
but defensive catch_unwind inside drop would harden the boundary.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
